message:
fix(share): harden bundle export, deployment, and static rendering against symlink traversal

bundle.rs:
- Add ensure_real_directory() that creates directories component-by-
  component, rejecting symlinks and ParentDir traversal at each step
- Add write_output_bytes() and copy_file_into_output() that validate
  relative paths and check for symlinks before writing
- Replace all fs::create_dir_all() + fs::write()/fs::copy() with the
  symlink-safe helpers throughout bundle scaffolding, chunk writing,
  viewer asset copying, and viewer data export
- Harden resolve_attachment_path() to return proper io::Error for
  policy violations (absolute path denied, root escape) instead of
  silently returning None, preventing misclassification as "missing"
  attachments
- Propagate attachment path errors as ShareError::Io to abort exports
  on policy violations rather than marking files as missing

deploy.rs:
- Add is_real_file()/is_real_dir() helpers, replace all .is_file()/
  .is_dir() calls across validate_bundle(), check_file_exists(),
  check_dir_exists(), build_platform_info(), compute_bundle_stats(),
  compute_integrity(), and validate_database_artifacts()
- Add ensure_real_directory(), write_text_file(),
  read_text_file_if_regular() with symlink rejection
- Harden walk_dir_inner() to skip symlinks using entry.file_type()
- Protect write_text_file_if_absent_or_identical() against symlinked
  deployment targets
- Harden load_deploy_history() and record_deploy() against symlinked
  history files
- Restructure validate_chunk_artifacts() to check is_real_file()
  before reading chunk config, preventing reads through symlinks

static_render.rs:
- Add ensure_real_directory() and write_text_file() with symlink
  rejection
- Replace all fs::create_dir_all() + fs::write() with symlink-safe
  helpers for pages, data, sitemap, search index, and navigation
- Add project_route_segment() that sanitizes project slugs through
  sanitize_filename() before using them as filesystem path components,
  preventing directory traversal via crafted project slugs like
  "../escape"
- Route all project links through sanitized route helpers

Adds tests for: root-escape attachment errors, disallowed absolute
path errors, symlinked viewer/bundle/data directories, symlinked
bundle root rejection, symlinked chunk payloads/checksums, symlinked
deploy tooling targets, symlinked history files, sanitized project
slug route segments, and symlinked pages directory rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
